description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in MySQL Eventum 1.5.5 and earlier allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) id parameter to view.php, (2) release parameter to list.php, or (3) F parameter to get_jsrs_data.php.
